items.title: add belgium and new zealand breweries
Added Washington new breweries, marked breweries for closure
updated Kismet Brewing Company as open
add One Way Brewing to MA
updated Lefty's Brewery to Lefty's Craft
updated Connecticut closures and existing missing data
fix Bog's Edge lat and long
add and update toronto, ontario breweries

releases.title: v1.1.0 (Now with docs!)
releases.notes:
What's Changed
* gh actions: bump docker/build-push-action from 6 to 7 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/openbrewerydb/openbrewerydb-laravel-api/pull/117
* gh actions: bump docker/metadata-action from 5 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/openbrewerydb/openbrewerydb-laravel-api/pull/118
* gh actions: bump docker/setup-buildx-action from 3 to 4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/openbrewerydb/openbrewerydb-laravel-api/pull/119
* gh actions: bump docker/login-action from 3 to 4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/openbrewerydb/openbrewerydb-laravel-api/pull/120
*
